title: psychotria miae
intro: Psychotria miae, also known as the Hawaiian gardenia or Mountain Island, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the islands of Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria miae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Psychotria miae can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, such as capsules or tinctures.
